name: Chronicler Archives
summary: An order of record keepers who preserve civic memory and investigate historical discontinuities.
public_goal: Maintain reliable records for courts, families, guilds, and councils.
private_goal: Determine whether reincarnation memories are recurring evidence of an older catastrophe.

relationships.notes: The archives restrict some ruin artifacts that the guild would rather sell.

notes: Archive seals are accepted as proof of verified testimony in most local courts.
